(**Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah Medal**) is an [honorary medal](/wiki/Civil_awards_and_decorations "Civil awards and decorations") of [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei").[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*] The award is subdivided into two classes: the first class *Darjah Pertama* and the second class *Darjah Kedua*.
["919 - Brunei, Sultanate, Pingat Hassanal Bolkiah, silver-gilt and enam..."](https://spink.com/lot/21001000919) *spink.com*. Retrieved 2024-02-15.

Noor (Haji), Kula Haji Md (2007). [*Kata dan bentuk sapaan bahasa dalam: dalam konteks pentadbiran beradat di Negara Brunei Darussalam*](https://books.google.com/books?id=egdRxZut6vQC&q=Sufri+Bolkiah) (in Malay). Dewan Bahasa dan Pustaka Brunei, Kementerian Kebudayaan, Belia dan Sukan. p. 94. [ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") [978-99917-0-526-2](/wiki/Special:BookSources/978-99917-0-526-2 "Special:BookSources/978-99917-0-526-2").
["KEPALA CHETERIA"](https://www.adat-istiadat.gov.bn/SiteCollectionDocuments/Senarai%20Gelaran/Wazir%20dan%20Cheteria.pdf) (PDF). *Jambatan Adat Istiadat Negara*. 4 December 2019. p. 2.
["Berangkat Menziarahi Jenazah Al-Marhumah Pengiran Babu Raja | Brunei's No.1 News Website"](https://www.brudirect.com/news.php?id=16257). *www.brudirect.com*. Retrieved 2020-04-24.
Brunei (1976). [*Brunei*](https://books.google.com/books?id=hK4vAAAAYAAJ&q=Bendahara+Pengiran+Muda+Hashim+DK). on behalf of the Information section, Department of State Secretariat, Brunei. p. 441.

[*A Year Book of the Commonwealth*](https://books.google.com/books?id=QsAgAAAAIAAJ&dq=Pengiran+Idris+Abdul+Kahar&pg=PA450). H.M. Stationery Office. 1974. p. 450. [ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") [978-0-11-580141-9](/wiki/Special:BookSources/978-0-11-580141-9 "Special:BookSources/978-0-11-580141-9").

Honorary medal of Brunei

The **Pingat Hassanal Bolkiah Sultan** (**Sultan Hassanal Bolkiah Medal**) is an [honorary medal](/wiki/Civil_awards_and_decorations "Civil awards and decorations") of [Brunei](/wiki/Brunei "Brunei").[*[citation needed](/wiki/Wikipedia:Citation_needed "Wikipedia:Citation needed")*] The award is subdivided into two classes: the first class *Darjah Pertama* and the second class *Darjah Kedua*.

The Sultan was receptive to the proposal and expressed his excitement when a former classmate of his from Class '64 of [Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien College](/wiki/Sultan_Omar_Ali_Saifuddien_College "Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien College") proposed a reunion supper. The Sultan personally agreed to present each of his old pupils with the PHBS at the banquet.[[1]](#cite_note-:3-1)

## Description

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Pingat_Hassanal_Bolkiah_Sultan&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Description")]

The first class medal included a small badge that matched a silver-gilt and enamel item.[[2]](#cite_note-2)
